wine_experiences.name: Grape Harvest on Etna - Benanti
wine_experiences.description: Autumn harvest experience at Benanti Viticoltori; participants pick Nerello Mascalese from centenary alberello vines, follow the grapes to the 18th-century palmento and observe the transfer to the modern cellar; includes guided tasting.
wine_experiences.tip: October is peak Nerello Mascalese harvest; book at least 6 weeks ahead as dates are fixed.

wine_experiences.name: Marsala Blending Workshop - Cantine Pellegrino
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on workshop at Cantine Pellegrino creating a personalised Marsala blend; participants trial components at the master cooper desk and leave with a bottled and labelled creation from their blend.
wine_experiences.tip: The master cooper element is a rare survival of the historic craft; combine with the cellar archaeological tour.

wine_experiences.name: Ben Ryé sotto le stelle - Donnafugata Pantelleria
wine_experiences.description: 100-minute sunset experience at Donnafugata's Pantelleria estate; a vertical tasting of Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC vintages on the panoramic terrace above UNESCO-listed Zibibbo alberello vineyards as the sun sets over the Mediterranean.
wine_experiences.tip: The premium evening experience at the estate; one of the most atmospheric wine moments in all Sicily.

wine_experiences.name: Contrade Vertical Tasting - Cottanera
wine_experiences.address: Strada Provinciale 89, Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
wine_experiences.description: Tasting of separately vinified Nerello Mascalese cuvees from multiple contrade at the same estate; a Burgundy-style comparison of Etna's distinct lava-flow zones expressed through single-contrada wines aged in the same cellar.
wine_experiences.tip: Request the Feudo di Mezzo versus Zottorinoto comparison; the lava-flow age difference creates a strikingly different wine profile.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale, 89 - Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia CT

wine_experiences.name: Etna 4x4 Volcano and Winery Adventure
wine_experiences.description: Full-day off-road adventure combining Etna's summit lava flows, a cave exploration and a winery tasting with olive oil; 4x4 vehicle access to areas not reachable by normal vehicle; English-speaking guides; rated 4.9/5.
wine_experiences.tip: Book the private tour version for custom winery selection; the lava cave sequence before the wine tasting is a dramatic contrast.

wine_experiences.name: Regaleali Harvest and Winemaking Week
wine_experiences.address: Contrada Regaleali, Case Vecchie, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno (CL), Sicily
wine_experiences.description: Immersive October harvest programme at the Anna Tasca Lanza school and Tasca d'Almerita Regaleali estate; combine grape picking with winemaking workshops, cooking classes and cellar sessions with the Tasca winemaking team.
wine_experiences.tip: The most complete harvest-to-cellar experience in Sicily; the cooking school integrates food and wine production in a single week.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Regaleali, Case Vecchie, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno CL, Sicily

wine_experiences.name: Donnafugata Iconic Wine Library Experience
wine_experiences.description: The premium tasting experience in Donnafugata's underground barrique cellar; a curated flight of the estate's most celebrated wines across all five Sicilian territories paired with explanation of terroir, viticulture and winemaking philosophy.
wine_experiences.tip: The Istanbul Basilica Cistern-inspired cellar is the most dramatic tasting setting in western Sicily.

wine_experiences.name: Aeolian Vineyard Sunset Picnic - Tenuta di Castellaro
wine_experiences.description: Sunset vineyard picnic at Tenuta di Castellaro on Lipari; platters of typical Sicilian products and traditional sweets served in organic volcanic-soil Malvasia vineyards with panoramic sea views over the Aeolian archipelago.
wine_experiences.tip: The sunset light over the Aeolian sea from the vineyard is among the most beautiful wine-landscape settings in Italy.

wine_experiences.name: Etna Amaro Mixology Workshop - Distilleria Russo
wine_experiences.address: Via Duccio Galimberti 68, 95010 Santa Venerina (CT), Sicily
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on cocktail creation class at Distilleria Fratelli Russo using Fuoco dell'Etna, Amaro di Sicilia and house botanical liqueurs; professional bartender instruction with Etna-volcano botanical sourcing narrative.
wine_experiences.tip: Pair with the botanical garden and distillation tour beforehand for the full Russo experience.

wine_experiences.name: Teatro in Vigna at Planeta Sciaranuova
wine_experiences.description: Annual Sciaranuova Festival: concerts and cultural events in Planeta's vineyard natural amphitheatre on Etna's north slope; wine served between performances; the estate's Iter Vitis museum path includes the festival setting.
wine_experiences.tip: Tickets sell out fast; the festival programme is announced in spring at planetaestate.it.
